roadmap.books: Deep Learning for NLP by Palash Goyal
roadmap.outcome: Comprehensive mastery of how words are mapped to high-dimensional space for deep learning models.
roadmap.resources: Stanford CS224n Lecture Series, 'Distributed Representations of Words and Phrases and their Compositionality' paper
roadmap.subtopics: Skip-gram, Negative Sampling, GloVe, FastText, and Contextualized Embeddings (ELMo)
roadmap.tasks: Implement Word2Vec from scratch using PyTorch; Perform intrinsic evaluation using word similarity datasets.
roadmap.topics: Advanced Word Representations and Vector Spaces

roadmap.books: Deep Learning for NLP by Palash Goyal
roadmap.outcome: Understanding the bottleneck of standard RNNs and how attention enables long-range dependency modeling.
roadmap.resources: Neural Machine Translation by Joint Learning to Align and Translate (Original Attention Paper)
roadmap.subtopics: Encoder-Decoder Architectures, Bahdanau vs. Luong Attention, Beam Search, and Teacher Forcing
roadmap.tasks: Build a Neural Machine Translation (NMT) system; Experiment with different attention scoring functions.

roadmap.books: Deep Learning for NLP by Palash Goyal
roadmap.outcome: Ability to implement and fine-tune state-of-the-art Transformer-based models for specific NLP tasks.
roadmap.resources: Hugging Face Course (Part 1), 'Attention Is All You Need' paper
roadmap.subtopics: Self-Attention, Multi-Head Attention, Positional Encoding, BERT, and GPT architectures
roadmap.tasks: Implement the Scaled Dot-Product Attention; Fine-tune a BERT model for Named Entity Recognition (NER) or Sentiment Analysis.

roadmap.books: Deep Learning for NLP by Palash Goyal
roadmap.outcome: Expertise in adapting massive language models to specialized domains with limited computational resources.
roadmap.resources: LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models paper, PEFT library documentation
roadmap.subtopics: Prompt Engineering, LoRA, QLoRA, and Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF)
roadmap.tasks: Apply LoRA to a 7B parameter model for a domain-specific task; Evaluate performance against full fine-tuning.

final_section.mistakes: Avoid treating NLP models as black boxes; failing to understand the underlying linear algebra of attention can lead to poor debugging. Also, do not ignore data quality—garbage in, garbage out remains true even for LLMs.
final_section.motivation: You are entering the most exciting era of computational linguistics. By mastering these advanced concepts, you aren't just learning to use AI; you are learning to shape the future of human-computer interaction.
final_section.tips: Spend at least 1 hour of your daily 2-3 hours specifically on coding implementations. Read the original research papers alongside the textbook to understand the 'why' behind the 'how'.
